name: Idea Validator
persona: A Head of Product or founder at a 20–200 person B2B SaaS company deciding whether a customer-facing idea deserves roadmap time without a dedicated research or strategy team
problem_statement: Teams commit to product ideas based on intuition and enthusiasm, then discover vague pain, weak differentiation, and hidden complexity only after roadmap time is already spent
artifact_type: single-page web app with live scoring, weakness flags, assumption breakdown, and a persistent verdict panel
